evidence.private_diagnostic_pattern: Claude described or attempted unavailable tools instead of receiving any episode observation; no latent truth is quoted here.

interpretation: The five numeric zeros are preserved in the immutable original artifact but are not evidence of Claude Opus 4.8 surveillance capability and must not enter a model comparison.

harness_changes: use an isolated temporary Claude home and project-only settings
load only the explicit epiagent MCP configuration
deny the inert built-in Read tool while exposing the public MCP tools
fail as infrastructure unless the init receipt contains exactly the twelve public MCP tools plus StructuredOutput
audit every Claude tool-use record for an unauthorized tool

root_cause: The precommitted Claude command combined safe mode, which disables MCP servers, with an empty available-tool list. The permission allowlist did not re-enable the trusted episode tools.
